title: CloudEvents
abstract: CloudEvents is a CNCF specification for describing event data in a common, portable envelope.
description: A technology record for interoperable event metadata across services and platforms.
roleInEcosystem: CloudEvents provides a shared event envelope for type, source, subject, identity, time and payload metadata.
bodyHtml:
Role

CloudEvents standardizes common event metadata so that producers, transports and consumers can exchange event records with fewer platform-specific assumptions.

Use

Electronic Artefacts can use it as a reference when defining VASTE event envelopes and public event projections.

References

See the CloudEvents specification and Event-Driven Architecture.
